use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS USING EXTENDED-RELEASE CARBAMAZEPINE
THE RECOMMENDED INITIAL DOSE OF EQUETRO IS 400MG/DAY GIVEN IN DIVIDED DOSES, TWICE DAILY. THE DOSE SHOULD BE ADJUSTED IN 200MG DAILY INCREMENTS TO ACHIEVE OPTIMAL CLINICAL RESPONSE.

indications.text:
1.1 Acute Manic or Mixed Episodes associated with Bipolar I Disorder
EQUETRO is indicated for treatment of patients with acute manic or mixed episodes associated with bipolar I disorder [see
Clinical Studies (14.1)] .

EQUETRO is indicated for treatment of patients with acute manic or mixed episodes associated with bipolar I disorder.
